title: Logger collector resilience: background health probe, auto-start, gitignore
description: Review and validate the implemented changes for browser.ts health check refactor, open option, and .gitignore auto-creation
acceptanceCriteria: browser.ts: ensureReady only checks collectorReady flag, no synchronous probeHealth call
browser.ts: background health probe runs on a 10s interval via setInterval
browser.ts: when collector is unready, log() returns { ok: true, status: 204 } immediately with zero fetch
browser.ts: BrowserLoggerOptions has open?: boolean option
browser.ts: open=true starts background probing immediately + spawns collector in Node
index.ts: startHttpLogServer creates .gitignore with * in log directory
server.go: Start() creates .gitignore in log directory
notes: This is a review run of already-implemented changes. The developer stage should verify the implementation matches the plan.
